name: Hunger's Reach

abilities.name: Violation of Reality
abilities.text: Once per activation. When declaring a (///) action, this model may choose a friendly Rift marker within 8". The action draws LoS and range from the chosen marker. After resolving the action, remove the chosen marker.

actions.name: Rally the Beyond
actions.effects: Choose a friendly Oni model within 8" and place it into base contact with this model.

extraction_notes: The ability Violation of Reality uses (///) to indicate the '////' action type symbol
Rally the Beyond is marked as a signature action with the double diamond symbol
